# Sovann Rai

A devoted pilgrim, always willing to offer aid to those who cross his path.

> **Ancestry:** Ribbet
> **Community:** Orderborne
> **Role:** Devout

## Features

**Witness (1):** Whenever an ally marks 1 or more Hit Points, **place 1 token** on this card.

**Restorative Blessing:** **Spend 3 tokens** to have _Sovann_ clear 1 Hit Point or 1 Stress from an ally within Melee range.
